args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(pwa): implement Periodic Background Sync for offline arrival refresh

Registers the 'mta-arrivals-refresh' periodic sync tag so the browser
can refresh cached arrivals for the user's favorite stations every ~5
minutes even when the app is not open. The service worker reads station
IDs from IndexedDB (written by usePeriodicSync) since SWs cannot access
localStorage. Degrades silently on browsers without Periodic Background
Sync support.

- packages/web/src/lib/periodicSync.ts: new module with IDB config
  storage (writeFavoritesToSyncConfig), registration (registerPeriodicSync),
  and usePeriodicSync React hook
- packages/web/public/sw-push.js: add periodicsync event handler that
  reads IDB station IDs and refreshes the Workbox arrivals-cache
- packages/web/src/vite-plugin-pwa.d.ts: add PeriodicSyncManager /
  PeriodicSyncEvent type declarations (not yet in lib.dom.d.ts)
- packages/web/src/App.tsx: call usePeriodicSync() in AppRoutes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

output:
